title: George Zestos
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: George Zestos
Snapshot: 2026-07-21

confidence.rationale: Proposed from an explicit normalized Knowledge Object field.
Proposed from an explicit normalized Knowledge Object field.

biography: Dr. George K. Zestos is a Professor of Economics and Jean Monnet Chair of European Integration at Christopher Newport University in Virginia. He began his university studies at the Aristotelian University of Thessaloniki Greece, where he studied economics and political science for two years. He continued his college education in the US at Saginaw Valley State University in Michigan where he received a B.A. degree in economics and business. He received his M.A. in economics from Michigan State University and his Ph.D. from Indiana University (Bloomington). Dr. Zestos taught at DePauw University and Ball State University for total six years before he started his academic career at Christopher Newport University. Professor Zestos teaches courses in introductory economics, international economics, applied econometrics, and European Integration . His research interests are in international economics and particularly in European integration, a topic on which he wrote his Ph.D. dissertation and a textbook, European Monetary Integration: The Euro. His most recent book, The Global Financial Crisis: From US subprime mortgages to European sovereign debt, was published by Routledge UK in October 2016. His research has appeared in a variety of journals, including: Journal of Policy Modeling (Belgium), Journal of Economic Integration (Korea), Southern Economic Journal (US), Journal of International Economic Studies (Japan), Review of International Economics (US), Atlantic Economic Journal (US), Economia Internazionale (Italy), Journal of Business and Society (Cyprus), International Journal of Banking and Finance (Australia), and Journal of Economic Asymmetries (Canada). He involves several students in his research and collaborates with scholars from the US and other countries, such as China, Canada, and Greece. His hobbies are reading, traveling, fishing, gardening, soccer, and reading.
education_entries: Ph D in Economics, Indiana University
MA in Economics, Michigan State University
BA in Economics-Political Science, Saginaw Valley State University
research_interests: Economic Integration Applied Econometrics Monetary and Fiscal Policy International Economics The International Financial Crisis. Chinese Economic Growth Export growth in Germany and Japan a comparative study Public debt and GDP growth papers in several countries such as USA, Germany and Canada,using ARDL

Journal Article, Academic Journal Remittances, Exports, and ODA: Their Impact on Economic Growth in Egypt of Economic Studies) . Maghreb-Mashreq International.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). Envois de fonds, exportations et APD : leur impact sur la croissance économique en Égypte . Maghreb - Machrek. Volume, n° 258. Issue, 2. Pages, 31-51.
Journal Article, Academic Journal Determinants of German and Japanese Exports: A Comparative Study . Journal of Economic Integration. Volume, 36. Issue, 3. Pages, 339-371.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2020). A Vector Error-Correction Model for Japanese Real Exports . Atlantic Economic Journal. Issue, 48. Pages, 297–311.
Book, Textbook-Revised Global Financial Crisis . Pedio. Volume, 1. Issue, 1st. Pages, 397.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2018). Determinants of Real Chinese GDP 1978-2014 . Atlantic Economic Journal. Volume, 46. Issue, 2. Pages, 161-177.

Journal Article, Professional Journal (2016). Causal Relations between Northern Country Trade Imbalances and Southern Debt in the Euro Area . Journal of Economic Integration. Volume, 31. Issue, 4. Pages, 898-931.
Book, Chapter in Scholarly Book-New (2012). Why the European Sovereign Debt Crisis Has Not Been Resolved Yet . Pages, 12.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2010). Empirical Evaluations of the US and Canadian Monetary Policies and the Associated Causal Linkages . Journal of Business and Economic Studies.
awards_honors: • CNU Annual Faculty Award Excellence in Scholarship, Christopher Newport University. (2018)
Best Paper of the Conference Global Research Conference 13-14 JULY 2017, WORLD BUSINESS INSTITUTE, AUSTRALIA. (2017)
Research Award George K Zestos, International Academy of Business and Public Policy. (2014)
George K Zestos, International Academy of Business and Public Administration. (1914)

Presentations: George Zestos, Yixiao Jiang, Ryan Patnode, World Finance Conference, "Investigating the Nexus of Casual Macroeconomic Relations of Japan," Valeta, Malta. (2020)
